# HeyGen vs Synthesia

- **URL:** https://www.synthesia.io/alternatives/synthesia-vs-heygen
- **Score:** 39/100 — High
- **Findings:** 3
- **Last checked:** 2026-04-24
- **Last change detected:** 2026-04-24

## 🔗 Link (1)

### 1. ⚪ Flagged for review

**Quote from page:**
> https://www.g2.com/categories/video-communications?...

**Suggested fix:**
> Couldn't verify: G2 returns 403 to bots. Link is likely still live for real users. Spot-check manually if needed.


## 💰 Pricing (3)

### 1. 🔴 Confirmed

**Quote from page:**
> **Creator**: $24 per month (max. 5 minutes per video).

**Suggested fix:**
> **Creator**: $29/month (up to 30 minutes per video). HeyGen's Creator tier is now $29/mo billed monthly (lower annually) and the per-video duration cap was raised from 5 min to 30 min.

**Source:** https://heygen.com/pricing — Checked 2026-04-24

### 2. 🔴 Confirmed

**Quote from page:**
> **Teams:** $69 per month (max. 6 minutes per video).

**Suggested fix:**
> Replace with: **Business**: $149/month (up to 60 minutes per video). The $69 Teams tier no longer exists — HeyGen's current paid tiers above Creator are Pro ($99/mo) and Business ($149/mo).

**Source:** https://heygen.com/pricing — Checked 2026-04-24

### 3. 🟡 Likely

**Quote from page:**
> Synthesia starts at $18/month whereas HeyGens start at $24/month, so we recommend Synthesia based on the price-value ratio it delivers.

**Suggested fix:**
> Synthesia starts at $18/month (annual billing) whereas HeyGen paid plans start at $29/month billed monthly — so we recommend Synthesia for price-to-value. (HeyGen's exact annual rate isn't publicly exposed; confirm before shipping.)

**Source:** https://heygen.com/pricing — Synthesia $18 still correct; HeyGen $24 appears outdated vs current $29 monthly.


## 📊 Stat (1)

### 1. ⚪ Flagged for review

**Quote from page:**
> (informational) Verified as still-current: Synthesia $0/mo Basic, $18/mo Starter, $64/mo Creator; HeyGen Free $0/mo for 1 min; '90% of Fortune 100'; '50,000 companies'.

**Suggested fix:**
> No change needed — these were checked against live sources on 2026-04-24 and still match.
